title: LA7 7FR, Tretonia UK Ltd: environmental permit application advertisement - EPR/UB3950HL/A001
body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received a new bespoke application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 from Tretonia UK Ltd.  Application number  EPR/UB3950HL/A001  Regulated facility type  BS12566 Package treatment plant and an infiltration system  Regulated facility address   Viver GreenViver LaneHincasterMilnthorpeLA7 7FR   National grid reference discharge point  SD 51343 84045  Receiving environment  Groundwater via an infiltration system  Effluent type  Secondary treated sewage effluent  Volume  24.15 cubic metres per day  How to view the application  Please contact us via e-mail at psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk or contact us on 03708 506 506 to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 6 September 2024. You can comment:  Via email: psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at https://www.gov.uk/guidance/environmental-permits-privacy-notice "
